mnemonics.title: Data Structure Classification
mnemonics.content: PNL-N: Primitive, Non-primitive (Linear, Non-linear) - Remember the hierarchy of data structure types.

mnemonics.title: Linear Data Structures
mnemonics.content: ASQL: Array, Stack, Queue, Linked List - the four main linear data structures.

mnemonics.title: Common Operations
mnemonics.content: TSISD-MU: Traverse, Search, Insert, Sort, Delete, Merge, Update - seven operations on data structures.

mnemonics.title: Stack vs Queue
mnemonics.content: Stack = LIFO (Last plate on stack removed first), Queue = FIFO (First person in line served first).
